message:
fix(clippy): rename from_* methods in fnx-convert to fix wrong_self_convention

Renamed from_edge_list_into -> populate_from_edge_list and
from_adjacency_into -> populate_from_adjacency to satisfy
clippy::wrong_self_convention. These are internal mutation helpers,
not constructors.

Unblocks workspace-wide `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`.

br-iuc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
